source.author: Intergalactic Herald
source.classification_rationale: Weekly newsletter/recap aggregates developments and linked sources.

summary.neutral_abstract: Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week. We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us. The First Star Atlas Community Polis Improvement Proposal -DAO Owned Claim
summary.historical_value: Contemporary Intergalactic Herald publication preserved with role and attribution boundaries.
summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
Star Atlas: Pearce x6 Review Showroom 2.1
Tomorrows World posted a video reviewing the Star Atlas Pearce X6.
STAR ATLAS #185 What I’m Doing for Resources
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video about farming for R4 resources in Star Atlas.
Metaverse Nomads #98 Star Altas w/ Lumina
Metaverse Nomads posted a video of their weekly Star Atlas live stream.
The First Star Atlas Community Polis Improvement Proposal -DAO Owned Claim Stakes
The Hologram published an article about a community proposal for the DAO.
WEEKLY STAR ATLAS NEWSLETTER #83
Aephia published their weekly Star Atlas newsletter.
Wagner and Co. Comment on Star Atlas Economic Transition
The Hologram published an article about comments from Star Atlas on the economic transition.
Star Atlas : Will Your Fleet Survive? Major Giveaway
PockThePirate posted a video of Star Atlas updates.
Polaris Fuel Proposes Alternative to PIP-X
The Hologram published an article about another Star Atlas community proposal.
Stat Atlas News June 14th Never Alone Escape Velocity Twitter and R4!
Beyond The Horizon posted a video about Star Atlas updates.
